project_title: Urgent! (Welcome University student volunteer) Life-Planning and Financial Literacy Workshop Facilitator (17 Jan)
project_description: Inspiring students with your insights to set education and career goals based on their skills, interests, values, and finances

organization.name: Junior Achievement Hong Kong
organization.description: Junior Achievement Hong Kong (JA HK) is one of the 100+ members of JA Worldwide, and a leading provider of Other Learning Experiences in Hong Kong. Through hands-on, immersive learning in career readiness, entrepreneurship and financial health, JA programs enable young people to learn the world of work from the first-hand experience of business volunteers. Since our establishment in 2001, we have engaged the support of over 28,000 business volunteers from some 700 companies to serve more than 420,000 students from over 600 schools. Visit www.jahk.org for more details and updates about us and our programs.

what_we_need: Share your personal and professional financial management knowledge and experiences with students
Lead a team of students through a series of activities, from interactive games, discussions to role-plays
Sharing your university life to students
Become a role-model and support students' planning for their future
The session will be held on 17 Jan 2025 from 3:30am-5:00pm
project_details.background: Our an innovative blended-learning initiative that aims to support young people's self-exploration and enhance their readiness for tomorrow's radically different jobs and workplaces. Students will build a foundation for making intelligent, lifelong personal finance decisions. Empower them to align the realities of life and personal choices at different life stages to live their dreams.
project_details.what_we_have: All program materials will be provided by JA HK and a volunteer briefing session will be arranged before the program.
project_details.why_important: Support from Volunteers will be an essential part of our mission in bridging youths with the real world of work
project_details.location: St Teresa Secondary School Ho Man Tin
